## LibraryRuntime.Internal.SpoonScaler class

Scaler for spoon measurements (tsp/Tbsp) with fractional support. Handles conversion between tsp and Tbsp (1 Tbsp = 3 tsp).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class SpoonScaler implements IUnitScaler 
```
**Implements:** [IUnitScaler](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.internal.iunitscaler.md)
